The '''''Famulus''''' was a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruise]] in the service of [[House Vandron]] around the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. During the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Mission to Senex]], the ''Famulus'' was tasked with relaying images back to [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]], which allowed the Chancellor to see the destruction of the [[Ecliptic (Consular-class)|''Ecliptic'']] in a minefield near [[Asmeru/Legends|Asmeru]].

{{Ship-stub}}
